name: BONE CONTUSION
definition: BONE BRUISE acute bone injury in children

demographics.Path: subcortical trabecular microfractures → intraosseous hemorrhage + edema without

discriminating_features: high T2 signal intensity = marrow edema + hemorrhage

general: high T2 signal intensity = marrow edema + hemorrhage

clinical.Prognosis: healing in 12-16 weeks (much longer than for a typical cortical fracture)
clinical.Cx: insufficiency fracture ← return to normal physical activity before complete healing
